description: At month-end, the property manager must reconcile the property's bank trust account with the records in the software.

nodes.task_description: Download the monthly bank statement for the property trust account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves the bank statement.

nodes.task_description: Compare each transaction on the bank statement to the transactions recorded in the property management software.

expected_outcome.value: Agent systematically checks off matching transactions.

nodes.task_description: Identify and resolve any discrepancies (e.g., a bank fee not recorded, a cleared check not marked as such).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds and corrects all discrepancies, resulting in a balanced reconciliation.
